steps.title: Track the timeline
steps.content: The passage first describes Wong's court victory in January 1885. The sentence with the blank describes a separate action in April of the same year.

steps.title: Reject nonchronological links
steps.content: Choice B makes the letter an example of the court victory. Choice C makes it a restatement. Choice D signals contrast. None fits two events presented in time order.

steps.title: Choose sequence
steps.content: Later correctly shows that the April open letter occurred after the January court case. The answer is A.
